description: SoC-level ATB packet network. Sources (INIU): dsp_ss0~5 (128b), mipi_ss (128b), camera_ss (128b). Sink (TNIU): debug_tniu_ss. Buffer/CDC is internal to each INIU sys side; topology contains only INIU, funnel, async_bridge_slv/mst, and TNIU nodes.

ATB async bridge slave stage — CDC from core/fabric domain into async bridge domain
ATB async bridge master stage — CDC from async bridge domain back to core/debug domain

edges.note: mipi INIU top-side payload -> camera funnel
left funnel -> async bridge slv (source domain)
async bridge mst (dest domain) -> right funnel
right funnel -> TNIU top-side -> debug SS
